---
# No `title:` here on purpose — we want a custom hero instead of the default
# page title block. `pagetitle` only sets the browser tab text.
pagetitle: "BioM2 Lab — Home"
page-layout: full
toc: false
# Show the most recent news posts below the hero
listing:
  - id: latest-news
    contents: news          # the news/ folder of posts
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 3
    date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
    fields: [image, date, title, description]
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

::: {.hero-anim}
:::

::: {.hero-banner}
# Predicting forests and biosphere under a changing planet

[Principles and solutions integrating *in situ* and *in silico* research]{.lead}

[Meet the team »](team.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg}
:::


## Latest news

::: {#latest-news}
:::

[All news →](news.qmd)
